data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. TIDEFORD fought on well when finishing third of seven last start over 2000m at Launceston when trying to lead all of the way, making it two straight placings. Racing well this prep and could prove hard to roll. 11. RESERVOIR DOG in what was his second run this prep finished second of seven over 2000m at Launceston after being in the firing line into the turn. Looks well placed and is worth an each-way ticket. 1. IFFYCOULD came home well from seventh of nine into the turn to finish a close fourth over 2100m at Launceston last start. Has a 2kg claimer taking over the reins and rates well as a main danger. 6. MOORLANDS MISS finished a close third of nine over 2100m at Launceston last start after racing on the speed to the turn. Drops back 100m in distance and is a must include in exotic bets.","runners":[5,11,1,6],"exclusive":true}
